prestazioni: Engine: M06RS (7.1L supercharged inline-6) with forged internals including Mahle Motorsport 9:1 compression pistons, Carrillo H-beam connecting rods, and a billet crankshaft from JE Pistons. Supercharger upgraded to a custom-built Roots-type blower with a Whipple 4.0L compressor housing and 10% overdrive pulley for 18 psi boost, paired with a custom intercooler core from Bell Intercoolers (aluminum bar-and-plate, 4.5" thick, 22x12x4 dimensions).

Fuel System: Dual Bosch 044 high-flow fuel pumps feeding a set of 12x ID1700x injectors (calibrated via AEM Infinity 7 standalone ECU with custom M06RS-specific maps). Fuel pressure regulated to 75 psi via Aeromotive 340 Stealth pump and AN-8 braided lines with -8AN fittings. Custom 3.5" velocity stack intake manifold with polished aluminum runners and a 90mm throttle body from Kinsler Fuel Injection.

Drivetrain & Suspension: Reinforced 4-speed manual transmission with a custom Quaife ATB differential (85% lockup) and a Sachs Performance twin-disc clutch (paddle-type, 300mm diameter). Front suspension converted to a custom coilover setup with Ohlins TTX40 dampers (2-way adjustable, 250lb/in springs) and spherical bearing control arms from H&R. Rear suspension features a de Dion tube with adjustable Watts linkage and Bilstein B16 dampers (180lb/in springs). Braking system upgraded to a 6-piston AP Racing caliper setup (380mm rotors front, 355mm rear) with Ferodo DS3000 pads and braided stainless steel lines.
estetica: Body: Full lightweight aluminum body panels (hand-formed by RML Group) with riveted and bonded construction, including a custom 3-piece front splitter (carbon fiber, 4" overhang) and a rear diffuser from APR Performance (carbon fiber, 3-element design). Hood features a functional central scoop (aluminum, 6" diameter) with NACA ducting for intercooler airflow. Fenders widened 3" per side with hand-rolled aluminum flares and integrated side skirts (aluminum, 2.5" drop).

Aerodynamics: Custom rear wing (aluminum, 60" span, 12" chord) with adjustable angle of attack (0-15 degrees) and integrated Gurney flap (0.5" height). Underbody features a full-length aluminum belly pan with vortex generators and a rear diffuser extension (carbon fiber, 5-element design). Side mirrors replaced with custom carbon fiber units (3D-printed mounts, 40% smaller than OEM) from DTM-spec Mercedes W202 parts bin.

Interior & Details: Full stripped interior with a custom roll cage (T45 steel, 6-point, integrated into the A-pillars) from Safety Devices. Seats replaced with Recaro Pole Position II (carbon fiber shell, 6-point harnesses from Schroth). Steering wheel is a custom 14" suede-wrapped unit from Personal with a quick-release hub. Gauges are a Motec C127 dash (8-inch display) with integrated data logging. Exterior paint is a custom-mixed silver (PPG DBC9700, 3-stage pearl) with hand-brushed aluminum accents on the fenders and hood.
